prestazioni: Engine: B5234T5 (2.3L turbocharged inline-5, 240hp stock) – Full forged internals with Manley 87mm forged pistons, Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft from JE Pistons to handle 1.5 bar boost reliably. Upgraded head studs from ARP and ported/polished cylinder head by Ferrea Racing for optimized flow.

Turbocharger: Garrett GT3076R .63 A/R with a custom 3-inch stainless steel downpipe and Tial 44mm external wastegate, paired with a custom-mapped Bosch Motronic 4.4 ECU reflash by MTEC (UK) for aggressive ignition timing and fueling under boost.

Suspension: Öhlins Road & Track DFV coilovers with custom valving for the T-5R’s unique subframe geometry, paired with polyurethane bushings from Powerflex (front control arms, subframe, and trailing arms) and a 25mm rear sway bar from IPD Motorsport to reduce body roll.
estetica: Body Kit: Rare Volvo OEM ‘T-5R’ widebody conversion (front fenders, rear quarter panels, and rear bumper) with custom carbon fiber side skirts from Heico Sportiv for a seamless fit. Front splitter and rear diffuser from D2 Racing, matched to the original T-5R yellow paint code (312).

Wheels: 17x8.5 ET35 BBS RK II (gold) with 225/45/17 Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires, retaining the OEM 5x108 bolt pattern. Custom center caps with T-5R logo from a limited-run batch by Volvo Classic Parts.

Interior: Recaro SRD-E full bucket seats (replica of the OEM T-5R seats) upholstered in black Alcantara with yellow stitching, paired with a MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel (380mm) and a custom roll cage by Custom Cages UK (half-cage, bolt-in, TIG-welded 4130 chromoly).
